creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
On 2011-01-23 02:22, Jason Helfman wrote:
> I have updated this port so doesn't download during the build.
> Builds clean in tinderbox.
> Please re-consider re-evalutating this port.
> 
> Thanks!
> Jason

Hi Jason,

looks good to me, but I have some small changes ...

- moved the test for existing ~/.m2 into a pre-extract: section
  and test there additional if .m2 is maybe a link.
  (If a link is present it is saver to stop then override an existing custom link)

- swapped "tar ... && ln -s" to "ln -s && tar ..."
  else it can happen you end with a link to ${WRKSRC}/.m2/.m2

- replaced /root/.m2 and ${HOME}/.m2 with ~/
  which points every time to the right location.
  (A small test script is in the uploaded tar file, test it as root, with/without
  sudo and with/without 'Defaults env_keep += "HOME"' in sudoers.

- removed OPTION MYSQL
  It is the only database at the moment and if deselected install stops with
this error

BUILD SUCCESSFUL
Total time: 4 seconds
install: /jasperserverCreate-.ddl: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/jasperserver.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/jasperserver.

I've uploaded only the changed Makefile
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_150208_jasperserver_Makefile_2011-01-24
and as bz2 in case the custom DOS2UNIX expression is mangled
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_150208_jasperserver_Makefile_2011-01-24.bz2

Additional the small test script for "~/"
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_150208_jasperserver_home-test
